experiments.raw: Two things to share tonight:First- I’ve been working with my brother for a few months on his chronic constant pain from injuries and surgeries. I’ve burned capsules, cards and recently a bracelet so that he might feel some relief. I’m up to the 5G level and he keeps saying that he feels nothing. Finally I told him whether or not he felt anything....it was still working. Today he told me that his wife noticed that he was walking without the limp he developed because of the pain. He called me to thank me and say that he never doubted, however he hadn’t even noticed this major improvement. I suppose since the pain was much less it didn’t enter into his consciousness!Second- I took my dog to the vet today and received disturbing news. This is a new vet for us since we moved and she is an holistic vet. After the diagnosis she did a muscle test to see which medication would work best for him. When she brought him out I mentioned the frequencies in his capsule on his collar as well as the fact that I was using quantum energy as the delivery. She held the capsule in her hand, waited for several seconds then told me it was okay for him! I was concerned that I was going to have to explain it to her, however she knew as well as felt it! I love this vet!!! Max

experiments.raw: I love the interesting conversations and descriptions I’m reading. I’ll add my own experience to the mix. I’ve had the HEAL capsules for a few weeks now. My 13 yo daughter and I did a little experiment to see how or if the purported quantum energy in the titanium spheres might impact the germination of some flower seeds she wanted to plant. So we placed the seeds on three separate plates all under the same conditions of light, temperature and moisture. In one plate she also placed one titanium sphere wrapped in foil; in another plate she placed three spheres. These are the pictures of the seeds after one week. Now, one can create many scientific and rational explanations as to why these plates of seeds look the way they do now. All I can say is that it is obvious that the sprouts that were germinated in close proximity to the titanium spheres are much more vibrant and healthy. What does this mean, I’m not sure. However, the potential implications to me are astounding. I mean, something that is energetically powerful enough such that mere exposure to its field could influence a positive impact on the life force of creation is to me pretty profound. Anyway, I thought it would be fun to share this little home science experiment to add to the fun!😊

With levels 4-7 I would personally keep it at under 1:30 minutes cumulative. 2.) our cards never come overcharged, so you can use them in the quantum bloc. It just gets tricky with an infinity bloc. In that case just create a large foil once in the ibloc (takes only 10-15 seconds). Then use the foil for frequency transfer moving forward. And use the card for the “regular” use.3.) doesn’t really work4.) nothing really gets close to metals in regards to level of absorption and transmission of quantum energy. There is no “rule” that works for everyone. I personally put my picture inside the IB (currently using 6 or 7 depending on where I’m at) for a few hours every day. That is NOT recommended at all to do in the beginning. It is something to gradually move towards if you like. Initially, depending on your lifestyle, health and state of consciousness, we usually suggest between 5-10 minutes per day at first. That can be easily increased to 2-3 times 5-10 min per day by the following week, etc. It is important to FEEL what the right “dosage” os for you. Even if you think you can’t feel it…you will. That knowledge is there. And it’s not that you would hurt yourself if you did it too long. It may then spark some detox effects or slight uncomfort in the nervous system due to the high energy. The active Travel Bloc showed a visible reduction in the stickiness of red blood cells with reduced rouleaux formation AND especially reduced non-specific red blood cell aggregates, reduced early fibrin formation, and increased white blood cell motility. These results indicate that Travel Bloc has a protective effect on the blood. The increased white blood cell motility indicates a possible enhancement of immune surveillance that could be further studied. By contrast, the sham device had negligible effects on the blood parameters.”

experiments.raw: After my initial post with all the questions, I watched all of K.Elmer's videos and quite a few of the Leela and QU vids, so I'm now a bit more familiar with the hardware and energy options. I first removed the two front TB posts which allowed me to put small plates, bowls, mugs, etc. into the TB that the four posts prevented. Then, when I heard that the TB plates could be separated up to about 3 meters to surround even large objects, I attached the two removed posts to the bottom two, using the round nuts to connect each pair. This allowed me to put in larger mugs and jars and bottles up to almost 9" in height, as the picture shows. This makes the TB far more versatile. I would suggest that, as you've provided special screws to connect the IB plates, you include two threaded sleeves that can connect two posts more firmly than the round nuts do, as the nuts only grab a couple of threads of each post. As you can see, I can now put my 32 ounce smoothie in the TB where before I was limited to things like a 5 oz juice glass or small monkey dish. While I'm here, a few more questions. I'm trying to use glass or ceramics as much as possible to place items in; any problems using a plastic container? What about putting paper with mantras/affirmations or photos inside a plastic sleeve or baggie to protect them; does the plastic interfere or contaminate the energy flow? Has anyone used coins for frequency storage? I separate my vitamins/supplements into odd/even days as I take so many, …

experiments.raw: A quick update regarding our greenhouse project: the combination of a geodesic dome with an infinity bloc inside is absolutely epic! I almost can’t believe the results we’re seeing. Since the geodesic dome manufacturer is just a few hours away from where we are, I’ve been in touch in regards to growing times, yield, etc. While those domes work really great on their own, it appears that we have a roughly 25-50% faster growth because of the infinity bloc. We can’t exactly compare apples to apples because for that we would need the exact same dome with the exact same produce planted at the same time sitting somewhere else. That we plan to do in the spring, but now we first need to solve the “problem” of where to move the infinity bloc lol, because all vegetables are growing so massively that the physical space for the infinity bloc gets smaller and smaller 😂

experiments.raw: For all those tangible people out there, here’s an interesting observation with the HEAL capsule. I’m currently sprouting chickpeas. Said chickpeas always have some weevils. The interesting part was when I gave one to my mom who has been having seizures and other health issues like low energy, and likely extra sensitivity to smart meters, wi-fi, etc. She put it around her neck and immediately said she felt a kind of gentle vibration. She seems to notice the effects even more. I'm hoping it will give her more energy so she doesn't have to just sit around resting all day. My wife and me with our HEAL capsules.

experiments.raw: I've noticed my IB, Ajna, heals any type of acute would I've had on my hand/s over these last several months. I burned my index knuckle last night, ran right over and put my hand under for a while, knuckle is doing great today. Over the previous months, I've also had two hand wounds, got a burn on my thumb nail that hurt like heck, burned into the bed, within 2 days the burned part fell off (also the burn mark was in the shape of a heart!), and I've cut my hand, again, ran right over the my IB and kept my hand there. Each of these 3 times I've had pretty immediate healing regarding the wound.

How?At Leela Quantum Tech, we believe in the pursuit of BUY 1 GET 1 TREE! Through this program, we have sworn to plant 1 tree for every purchase. experiments.name: Philipp Samor von Holtzendorff
experiments.summary: What if you could attract the perfect job, the perfect life partner, and the perfect house with your mind?Dr. David Hawkins knew that this was possibl...
experiments.raw: What if you could attract the perfect job, the perfect life partner, and the perfect house with your mind?Dr. David Hawkins knew that this was possible. He spent his life studying consciousness and created a logarithmic scale of consciousness as a linear model for a non-linear reality.Hawkins discusses what he calls attractor fields, which are magnetic resonances of consciousness that draw energy towards us. When we vibrate at a level of love and joy, we attract people, events and circumstances that are in harmony with that state of being.Coming from a state of fear, anger, or grief often results in further events and situations that will reinforce that state. From this perspective, our game in life can become one of raising our consciousness to draw health, happiness, and success to us, rather than dwelling in a state of discontentment trying to manipulate the outer world to try to make us happy.Below you find a good summary and overview about the Hawkins scale 👇

experiments.raw: Yes, I leave one IB separated just for bigger things. Just take the rods out and connect the 3 plates together using zip ties or screws like the one LeelaQ sells (link below). The spacing between the 3 plates needs to stay consistent, so you keep the nuts between them. As for max distance; the recommended distance between the plates when separated is 15ft. https://leelaq.com/product-category/leela-quantum-infinity-bloc-2/leela-quantum-screws/ When using screws, the three plates will look like this. How I charge my drinking water every day.

experiments.name: Justin
experiments.summary: I took the IB apart and charged all of the copper pipes from the main line coming into the house and all of the pipes going to and from my water softe...
experiments.raw: I took the IB apart and charged all of the copper pipes from the main line coming into the house and all of the pipes going to and from my water softener system. I also charged the copper pipes going into and out of my water heater. I then charged 4 brass rail pieces with the HEAL frequency and wrapped them around the main water pipe coming in. I also have a reverse osmosis system under my kitchen sink and I charged the metal holding tank. I have a few metal water bottles that I put the heal frequency in and charged. The way I understand it is if the metal bottle is charged, it will charge the water inside. I don't think plastic will charge water and I know that glass doesn't hold a charge well so I don't think it would charge water either.

On the other hand, quantum energy supersedes physics and can be manipulated by human consciousness. It is that quantum energy with which we are engaged and which we are cultivating within ourselves with the assistance of the various products and services. It is by increasing our own frequency that we are able to transmute or negate the effects of various physical energies upon us. Simply because of another energetic law: higher frequencies are stronger, hence can negate lower frequencies. Which is what this whole system is based on. Here is a simplified illustration of that scale.

experiments.name: Justin
experiments.summary: About a year ago I took my daughters camping. My youngest, who was 9 yrs old at the time, fell while climbing outdoors and injured her leg. We were a ...
experiments.raw: About a year ago I took my daughters camping. My youngest, who was 9 yrs old at the time, fell while climbing outdoors and injured her leg. We were a good distance away from a hospital so I did the best I could with what I had. Luckily I had brought my infinity bloc with me. I cleaned and wrapped the wound with a first aid kit I had in the car. We then immediately put her leg in the infinity bloc. We did several "treatments" in the bloc over the next few days. I believe the bloc helped the wound heal much faster then it would have otherwise. I also believe the bloc helped her cope emotionally with the injury. I've had an infinity bloc for a while so my daughters are well versed in the technology and understand how they work. She took comfort in knowing that the energy was going to help her heal and that it was going to be ok. The whole experience was very traumatic for her and I think it would have been much worse without the bloc.(Admins - if you feel this picture is too graphic, feel free to delete it)

Once the cone came off, she returned to licking her legs. I go her a HEAL collar to see if that might benefit her. I have also been putting her picture in the I-bloc daily. There is some improvement in her wounds. She has been at this for years, so I think this is not going to go away overnight. The open areas are smaller :)
